subject: fix(export): cold-audit round 2 — DRY, magic numbers, doc precision
body:
Addresses all 5 findings from the cold-audit pass on this branch:

1. OLD_CACHES duplication — pwaCleanup.js now exports OLD_CACHES;
   DebugPill.jsx imports it. Single source of truth; adding a third
   pre-rename cache propagates to both sites automatically.

2. DebugPill SW Caches race — added explicit code comment documenting
   the (microsecond) race window between cleanupOldCaches()'s fire-and-
   forget deletes and a user opening the diagnostic at startup. The
   Re-run button surfaces settled state. No behavior change — just
   writing down what's already true.

3. Bundle test magic numbers — lifted `100 * 1024` / `750 * 1024` to
   named constants VENDOR_PDF_MIN_KB / APP_CHUNK_HARD_MAX_KB next to
   APP_CHUNK_MAX_KB. Size assertions now use KB throughout (symmetric
   with the other tests). Comments updated.

4. TESTING_GUIDE E8 step 10 — rewrote the ambiguous "once the user has
   loaded the new SW at least once" into concrete action ("After a full
   reload following the deploy"), documented the pre-reload transient
   `warn` state as expected, and surfaced the Re-run button as the
   confirmation step. A tester can now follow the guide literally.

5. SESSION_NOTES.md bloat — rewritten from per-commit changelog form
   (~100 lines, 4 commit-history blocks) into snapshot form (42 lines,
   single consolidated accomplishments list). Matches CLAUDE.md's
   "compact context summary... not a changelog" rule.

No production code changes outside items 1–2. Tripwires + docs only.

Tags: pwa, debug-pill, tests, claude-md, docs, dry
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-export-fidelity
Semver: patch
